\begin{document}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}!/usr/bin/tclsh
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \hrulefill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ % beginning of TeX mode 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \centerline{\bf Towers of Hanoi (Tcl)} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}  
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}This program gives an answer to the following famous problem (towers of 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}Hanoi). 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}There is a legend that when one of the temples in Hanoi was constructed, 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}three poles were erected and a tower consisting of 64 golden discs was 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}arranged on one pole, their sizes decreasing regularly from bottom to top. 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}The monks were to move the tower of discs to the opposite pole, moving 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}only one at a time, and never putting any size disc above a smaller one. 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}The job was to be done in the minimum numbers of moves. What strategy for 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \hspace{\leftmargini}moving discs will accomplish this optimum transfer? 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}  \ % end of TeX mode \hrulefill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \hrulefill\ hanoi.tcl \ \hrulefill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }8{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc の数 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{for}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }p{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}p{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt\mc \ }3{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}incr{\tt\mc \ }p{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc に関するデータの置き場所\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{for}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }q{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}q{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}incr{\tt\mc \ }q{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }disc({\tt\$}p,{\tt\$}q){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{proc}{\tt\mc \ }init{\tt\_}array{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc に関するデータの初期化\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{global}{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }disc

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{for}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}j{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}incr{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }disc(0,{\tt\$}j){\tt\mc \ }[\textbf{expr}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}j{\tt\char'175}]

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }disc(1,{\tt\$}j){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }disc(2,{\tt\$}j){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }counter{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 移動回数カウンタ \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{proc}{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\_}result{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 結果の表示 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{global}{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }counter

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }incr{\tt\mc \ }counter

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{puts}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt\#}{\tt\$}{\tt\char'173}counter{\tt\char'175}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt "}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{for}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}i{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}={\tt\mc \ }2{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}incr{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }line{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt\char92}[{\tt\$}i{\tt\char92}]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{for}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}j{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}incr{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{if}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}disc({\tt\$}i,{\tt\$}j){\tt\mc \ }!={\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }append{\tt\mc \ }line{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt\$}disc({\tt\$}i,{\tt\$}j){\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{else}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{break}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{puts}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}line

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }ptr(0){\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc 移動用ポインタ（インデックス）\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }ptr(1){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }ptr(2){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{proc}{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}one{\tt\_}disc{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}i{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 1枚の disc を pole $i$ から\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole $j$ に移動する \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{global}{\tt\mc \ }disc{\tt\mc \ }ptr

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }incr{\tt\mc \ }ptr({\tt\$}i){\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}1

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }disc({\tt\$}j,{\tt\$}ptr({\tt\$}j)){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc({\tt\$}i,{\tt\$}ptr({\tt\$}i))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }incr{\tt\mc \ }ptr({\tt\$}j)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }disc({\tt\$}i,{\tt\$}ptr({\tt\$}i)){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{proc}{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}discs{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}n{\tt\mc \ }i{\tt\mc \ }j{\tt\mc \ }k{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \underline{\textsf{上から $n$ 枚目までの disc}}を、\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole $i$ から pole $j$ に\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole $k$ を経由して、移動する\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{if}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}={\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}discs{\tt\mc \ }[\textbf{expr}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\char'175}]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}i{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}k{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}j

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 関数 {\tt move\_discs}の中で、さらに自分自身 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}one{\tt\_}disc{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}i{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}j{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ {\tt move\_discs} が使われている。このような \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\_}result{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 手法は、「再帰的呼びだし」といわれる。 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}discs{\tt\mc \ }[\textbf{expr}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\char'175}]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}k{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}j{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}i

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \par\begin{center}\includegraphics[scale=0.3]{hanoi1}\quad\includegraphics[scale=0.3]{hanoi2}\end{center} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ たとえば、関数 {\tt move\_discs} を呼び出すことは、 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 上図のような操作をすることに対応する。\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }ptr(0){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }ptr(1){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{set}{\tt\mc \ }ptr(2){\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}init{\tt\_}array

\noindent
\mbox{}move{\tt\_}discs{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }2{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ {\tt ARRAY} 枚の disc をpole 0 から pole 1 に pole 2\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ };\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ を経由して、移動する \hfill 

\tt\mc 

\rm\mc
